post.content:
Hi I had my phone screening, at uber, they asked me alien dictionary from leetcode. 
I have never heard of this problem before but i gave exact same approach like make relationship bw characters and do topologic sort to generate order and for inbound collisions do dfs to resolve collisions. 
I was unable to complete code not even half but I explained my full approach. and wrote 4 lines in comments explaining my approach.
I believe it is extremely hard to come up with an approach on paper and code this within one hour timeframe, and also for someone who have never heard of this problem before.
# **What do you think my chances are of getting selected ? **
I just saw on youtube everyone is explaining same algorithm which i gave to them.

Not Hired.. am not sure what interviewers are seeking these days, I also take interviews weekly in my company, If a person who solves this problem on paer and explained to me  clearly, It's just that time was up and he was unable to code, either I would have gave him extra 10 mins or I would have marked him hire.. 
Strange it's very difficult to come up with intution and solve this question on paper and code it in one hour.

Learnings apart from this judgement: Do all the questions asked by company in past.
